scope: Senior SWE-Bench retry next-cycle pre-provider classifier unit coverage
interpretation: Retry-controller classifier test hardening only; not official Senior SWE-Bench mastery, not network no-search enforcement, and not a provider/evaluator run.
focused_regressions: All known pre-provider cycle-input validation stderr prefixes classify as pre-provider only before the catalytic-cycle phase marker.
Checkout-like stderr after the A²D catalytic-cycle phase marker remains provider-possible and is not classified as pre-provider.
Delimiter and unrelated stderr negative cases do not classify as pre-provider.

review.result: no A2D test blockers; warned to keep commit scoped away from unrelated sibling-project dirty files
